PowerShell($openai = if \($env:OPENAI_API_KEY\) { "SET \(length: $\($env:OPENAI_API_KEY.Length\)\)" } else { "NOT SET" }; $anthropic = if \($env:ANTHROPIC_API_KEY\) { "SET \(length: $\($env:ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.Length\)\)" } else { "NOT SET" }; Write-Output "OPENAI_API_KEY: $openai"; Write-Output "ANTHROPIC_API_KEY: $anthropic"; Write-Output ""; Write-Output ".env file in repo root:"; if \(Test-Path .env\) { \(Get-Content .env | Where-Object { $_ -match "_API_KEY" } | ForEach-Object { \($_ -split "="\)[0] + "=<redacted>" }\) -join "`n" } else { "no .env file" })

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5001 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "still listening: pid=$\($_.OwningProcess\)"; Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force }; Start-Sleep 1; \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5001 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object\).Count)
